evidence_label: case-001 lab outreach approval gate, not contact permission and not treatment advice

source_checks.result: Hydroxyurea, resveratrol, sirolimus, melittin, PF-06409577, T-BDMC, and 6-shogaol CID identity checks resolved on 2026-06-07.
thalassemia resveratrol and PF-06409577 thalassemia searches returned no studies on 2026-06-07.
Islamic anchors remain research-method motivation only, not biomedical evidence.

send_packet_if_approved: lab capability questions for erythroid model, HbF/HBG, maturation, viability, hemolysis, autophagy, cost, timeline, and raw-data format
source links only, not private records
first_quote_items: melittin hemolysis hazard control only if accepted
blocked_public_content: travel, import, purchase, or procurement requests
decision_rule: Do not contact a lab until explicit founder approval is recorded. If approved, send only the public-safe preclinical quote packet and keep ginger and T-BDMC as held addenda, not quote lines.
